metadata.task_title: Translating the language of a webpage
metadata.instruction: Visit www.france24.com/fr. Translate the news page in French on this webpage to English using Google Translate.
metadata.context: I want to get up-to-date about some news from France but the reliable news websites are mostly in French. I want to read the English Translation of this.

tabs.title: France 24 - Infos, news & actualités - L'information internationale en direct

actions.window_title: Program Manager

l3.rationale: Opening Google Chrome from the app list.

l4.rationale: Chrome is opened, focus moves to the address bar, the France 24 URL is typed, and Enter loads the site.

l5.rationale: The trace begins with browser search-box entry and opening the france24.com/fr webpage, which matches the initial visit goal.

focused_element.name: France 24 - Infos, news & actualités - L'information internationale en direct

l3.rationale: Scrolling the news page downward.

l4.rationale: The user scrolls through the France 24 page and briefly opens/closes a context menu while moving around the webpage content.

l5.rationale: Scrolling, opening a window, and moving through menu items indicate the user is accessing a menu likely related to language or translation controls.
